TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Piling, title = Piling, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Piling} }

S.FORM: == Piling == u sulit nu Hulam: śĮĒťļüťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hsinchu a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Piling. u kasalumaluma' nu Piling sa, 94 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 334 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 311 ku tademaw, pakalatu 93%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 23 ku tademaw, pakalatu 7%. u kasabinacadan, Tayan(Tayal) 90%, Pangcha(Amis) 1%, zumazuma 2%. caykaw nu Sakizayaay a niyazu', u Tayal a niyazu' kuyni. u Tayal sananay, cayay katalakaw ku uzip, sanglan ku tatayna, salengacay ku banges, mabana miadupay. u Incumin a tademaw tu, u Tayal a cidekay duut ku tademaw. u luma' nu Tayal i buyubuyuan. u Tayan a niyazu' u Tayan a niyazu' kuyni, katuud ku Tayan a tademaw itini. u zuma a tademaw sa u Pangcah, u Yuwatan, u Taluku, inayi' tu ku zuma a cidakay itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw inay' ku Sakizaya a tademaw mueneng itini, hakay izaw tu, caay henay misumad ku cidekay a ngangan nu Sakizaya. u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 10 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 5 a bulad pulung sausi (561,916), Pangcah (209,668), Tayan (90,185), Paywan (100,775), Yuwatan (58,465), Rukay (13,319), Puyuma (14,170), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,630), Yami (4,612), Saw (790), Kabalan (1,470), Taluku (31,530), Sakizaya (940), Sejek (10,023), Laaluwa (401), Kanakanabu (335), zuma (11,985), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,630), Yami (4,612), Saw (790), Kabalan (1,470), Taluku (31,530), Sakizaya (940), Sejek (10,023), Laaluwa (401), Kanakanabu (335), zuma (11,985)
S.PHON: == pir~…ĺiŇč == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: **** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßsin ¶ńßu a kuwan ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu pir~…ĺiŇč. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu pir~…ĺiŇč sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) **%, paŇč ¶ńßa(amis) *%, zumazuma *%. ¶ajkaw nu sakizajaaj a nijazu Ē~ °, u tajar~…ĺ a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni. u tajar~…ĺ sananaj, ¶ajaj katar~…ĺakaw ku uzip, saŇčr~…ĺan ku tatajna, sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj ku baŇč…ôs, mabana miadupaj. u in ¶umin a tad…ômaw tu, u tajar~…ĺ a ¶id…ôkaj duut ku tad…ômaw. u r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu tajar~…ĺ i bujubujuan. u tajan a nijazu Ē~ ° u tajan a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni, katuud ku tajan a tad…ômaw itini. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u paŇč ¶ańß, u juwatan, u tar~…ĺuku, inaji Ē~ ° tu ku zuma a ¶idakaj itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaj Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč itini, ńßakaj izaw tu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ¶id…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
S.FORM: == Piling == u sulit nu Hulam: śĮĒťļüťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hsinchu a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Piling. u kasalumaluma' nu Piling sa, 94 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 334 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 311 ku tademaw, pakalatu 93%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 23 ku tademaw, pakalatu 7%. u kasabinacadan, Tayan(Tayal) 90%, Pangcha(Amis) 1%, zumazuma 2%. caykaw nu Sakizayaay a niyazu', u Tayal a niyazu' kuyni. u Tayal sananay, cayay katalakaw ku uzip, sanglan ku tatayna, salengacay ku banges, mabana miadupay. u Incumin a tademaw tu, u Tayal a cidekay duut ku tademaw. u luma' nu Tayal i buyubuyuan. u Tayan a niyazu' u Tayan a niyazu' kuyni, katuud ku Tayan a tademaw itini. u zuma a tademaw sa u Pangcah, u Yuwatan, u Taluku, inayi' tu ku zuma a cidakay itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw inay' ku Sakizaya a tademaw mueneng itini, hakay izaw tu, caay henay misumad ku cidekay a ngangan nu Sakizaya. u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 10 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 5 a bulad pulung sausi (561,916), Pangcah (209,668), Tayan (90,185), Paywan (100,775), Yuwatan (58,465), Rukay (13,319), Puyuma (14,170), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,630), Yami (4,612), Saw (790), Kabalan (1,470), Taluku (31,530), Sakizaya (940), Sejek (10,023), Laaluwa (401), Kanakanabu (335), zuma (11,985), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,630), Yami (4,612), Saw (790), Kabalan (1,470), Taluku (31,530), Sakizaya (940), Sejek (10,023), Laaluwa (401), Kanakanabu (335), zuma (11,985)
S.PHON: == pir~…ĺiŇč == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: **** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßsin ¶ńßu a kuwan ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu pir~…ĺiŇč. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu pir~…ĺiŇč sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) **%, paŇč ¶ńßa(amis) *%, zumazuma *%. ¶ajkaw nu sakizajaaj a nijazu Ē~ °, u tajar~…ĺ a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni. u tajar~…ĺ sananaj, ¶ajaj katar~…ĺakaw ku uzip, saŇčr~…ĺan ku tatajna, sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj ku baŇč…ôs, mabana miadupaj. u in ¶umin a tad…ômaw tu, u tajar~…ĺ a ¶id…ôkaj duut ku tad…ômaw. u r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu tajar~…ĺ i bujubujuan. u tajan a nijazu Ē~ ° u tajan a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni, katuud ku tajan a tad…ômaw itini. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u paŇč ¶ańß, u juwatan, u tar~…ĺuku, inaji Ē~ ° tu ku zuma a ¶idakaj itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaj Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč itini, ńßakaj izaw tu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ¶id…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***),
